pi_items.source: Task description line 6: 'Save the document as ShippingLabels.docx'
Task description line 6: 'in the Documents folder (C:\\Users\\Docker\\Documents\\ShippingLabels.docx)'
Task description line 3. Web search for 'Summit Peak Adventures Denver Colorado' returns no matching business, confirming fictional/synthetic data.
Task description line 3. Web search for '1400 Mountain View Blvd Denver Colorado Suite 200' returns no matching address, confirming fictional/synthetic data.
Task description line 3. ZIP code is real (Denver, CO) but full address is fictional/synthetic.
Task description line 5: 'Set the font for ALL text to Arial, 10pt.' Verifier code also checks for Arial font.

Task description line 5 states 'Arial, 10pt.' Web search 'Avery 5160 complete guide' confirms recommended font size is 10-11pt for Avery 5160 labels. Metadata value of '20' contradicts task description.
Avery 5160 label specifications: 3 columns × 10 rows = 30 labels per sheet. Web sources confirm this. Verifier code (line 99) expects 29-31 cells (accounting for variations).

privileged_info_summary: The task uses Avery 5160 Easy Peel Address Labels with synthetic company data (Summit Peak Adventures, a fictional company at a non-existent Denver address). The Avery 5160 template creates 30 labels per sheet (3×10 grid, 1"×2.625" per label). The task requires formatting in Arial font at 10pt (not 20pt as metadata claims), center-aligned, with the company name in bold. Metadata contains one error: required_size should be 10, not 20.
